_source: Uniclass 2015 Table SL — Retail rooms (verbatim from primary NBS Source mirror declared in sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §1, supplemented by buildig/uniclass-2015 community CSV v1.22)
_note: Per-entry _verification_status records sourcing. Primary NBS leaf codes recruited from SL_20_50 Commercial spaces (20 verbatim codes, all confirmed present on NBS Source primary mirror 2026-06-06 — the SL_20_50 page notes 'No current codes' under Uniclass v1.35 April 2026 meaning these codes remain in taxonomy as superseded leaf nodes; retained as nbs_sourced per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2): SL_20_50_03 Ambient wholesale spaces, SL_20_50_05 Auction rooms, SL_20_50_10 Beauty salons, SL_20_50_12 Checkout points, SL_20_50_22 Department store shop floors, SL_20_50_29 Financial and professional services outlets (commercial.json scope), SL_20_50_30 Fitting rooms, SL_20_50_32 Food and drink outlets, SL_20_50_36 Hair and beauty salons, SL_20_50_37 Hair salons, SL_20_50_47 Livestock auction rooms, SL_20_50_51 Market stalls, SL_20_50_55 Motor vehicle showrooms, SL_20_50_70 Refrigerated wholesale spaces, SL_20_50_72 Retail kiosks, SL_20_50_74 Retail spaces (NBS mirror only — post-v1.22, absent from buildig CSV), SL_20_50_85 Supermarket shop floors, SL_20_50_86 Tan spray booths, SL_20_50_87 Tattoo and piercing parlours, SL_20_50_96 Waste and scrap yards (out of scope for retail room taxonomy). Retail-support SL_90 codes recruited from buildig CSV v1.22: SL_90_10_71 Retail circulation spaces, SL_90_50_35 General storerooms, SL_90_50_36 Goods stores, SL_90_20_16 Customer service counter areas, SL_90_20_85 Staff rooms, SL_90_20_69 Queuing areas. Engineering-consensus canonical_ids for retail sub-types not individually enumerated in Uniclass v1.35 (boutique_shopfloor, jewellery_display, electronics_display, fashion_floor, click_and_collect, loading_back_of_house, covered_arcade) cite BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27 retail sub-clauses (maintained illuminance + display accent), BCSC (British Council of Shopping Centres) Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §4.3 adjacency norms, and CIBSE SLL Lighting Guide LG-01:2018 (retail lighting) as engineering authority. SL_20_50_29 Financial and professional services outlets and SL_20_50_55 Motor vehicle showrooms are technically within SL_20_50 scope but assigned to commercial.json (banking hall, financial services, motor vehicle showroom entries); excluded here to avoid inter-file duplication. cross_references.cibse_lg + nrm2 stay null per Sprint Z deferral; building_type_codes back-filled at Z.D.1.

entries._inference_note: NBS Source SL_20_50_74 'Retail spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Present on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06; absent from buildig CSV v1.22 (post-v1.22 addition). Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

NBS Source SL_20_50_22 'Department store shop floors' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

NBS Source SL_20_50_85 'Supermarket shop floors' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

NBS Source SL_20_50_72 'Retail kiosks' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

Boutique / small-format specialty shop is not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_50_74 Retail spaces. Sub-type differentiation follows BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §4.3 (unit shop adjacency and shopfront depth norms for specialty tenants) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.3 (retail display accent ratio ≥ 3:1 ambient). CIBSE SLL LG-01:2018 §3.4 boutique accent lighting benchmarks apply.

Jewellery display / precious goods retail is not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_50_74 Retail spaces. Sub-type differentiation follows BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.4 (jewellery and precious goods retail: Em 1000 lx maintained task illuminance; display accent ratio ≥ 10:1) and CIBSE SLL LG-01:2018 §5.2 (high-sparkle display cabinets). BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §6.1 security and display adjacency requirements apply.

Consumer electronics display retail is not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_50_74 Retail spaces. Sub-type differentiation follows BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.3 (general retail, Em 500 lx maintained) supplemented by CIBSE SLL LG-01:2018 §4.3 (display wall uniformity Ra ≥ 80 for accurate screen colour rendering). BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §5.4 power-density and data-cabling allowances for electronics tenants apply.

Fashion / clothing retail floor is not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_50_74 Retail spaces. Sub-type differentiation follows BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.3 (retail, Em 500 lx maintained; Ra ≥ 80 for colour rendering of textiles) and CIBSE SLL LG-01:2018 §3.5 (fashion retail: high CRI and vertical illuminance on hanging rails). BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §4.5 fitting-room adjacency and rail density norms apply.

NBS Source SL_20_50_12 'Checkout points' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

NBS Source SL_90_20_16 'Customer service counter areas' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces (buildig CSV v1.22 confirmed). Used here as the canonical anchor for retail customer service desk. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.3 retail task illuminance applies; BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §7.2 customer service adjacency norms.

Returns / refund counter is not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_90_20_16 Customer service counter areas. Sub-type differentiation follows BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §7.3 (returns processing adjacency to stockroom and checkout) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.3 (retail task illuminance Em 500 lx maintained). Operationally distinct from checkout: returns require barcode scanning, product inspection, and back-of-house proximity.

Click-and-collect / BOPIS (buy online, pick up in store) counter is not enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35 (post-2012 omnichannel format). Closest NBS leaf is SL_90_20_16 Customer service counter areas. Sub-type differentiation follows BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §7.4 (omnichannel collection zone adjacency to stockroom; dedicated queuing allocation) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.3 (retail task illuminance Em 500 lx maintained). CIBSE SLL LG-01:2018 §6.1 secondary circulation illuminance applies to adjacent queuing zone.

NBS Source SL_20_50_30 'Fitting rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2.

NBS Source SL_90_50_35 'General storerooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces (buildig CSV v1.22 confirmed). Used here as the canonical anchor for retail stockroom. BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §8.1 back-of-house stockroom area-per-unit-frontage ratios apply. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.6 stockroom/storage illuminance (Em 100 lx minimum) applies.

NBS Source SL_90_50_36 'Goods stores' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces (buildig CSV v1.22 confirmed). Used here as the canonical anchor for retail goods receiving / delivery bay. BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §8.2 loading-dock access and segregation from public circulation apply. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.6 goods handling illuminance (Em 200 lx) applies.

Retail back-of-house / loading area is not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_90_50_36 Goods stores. Sub-type differentiation (dedicated loading dock distinct from goods store) follows BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §8.3 (service zone segregation from public realm; minimum vehicle turning radius) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.6 (goods handling, Em 200 lx). CDM Regulations 2015 safe traffic management at loading zones applies.

NBS Source SL_90_20_85 'Staff rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces (buildig CSV v1.22 confirmed). Used here as the canonical anchor for retail staff welfare room. Workplace (Health, Safety and Welfare) Regulations 1992 Regulation 25 (rest facilities) applies. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3.14 (break rooms, Em 200 lx) applies.

Retail store manager / back-office is not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_20_50_74 Retail spaces (the broader retail space anchor). Sub-type differentiation follows BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §9.1 (store management office adjacency to stockroom + CCTV monitoring station) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3.1 (office workspace, Em 500 lx maintained). Fire safety compliance with RRFSO 2005 management office requirements applies.

NBS Source SL_90_10_71 'Retail circulation spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_10 Circulation spaces (buildig CSV v1.22 confirmed). Specifically covers circulation routes within retail buildings and malls. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.1 (circulation zones adjacent to retail, Em 300 lx) and BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §3.2 (aisle width minima, dwell-zone lighting) apply.

Covered shopping arcade is not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Closest NBS leaf is SL_90_10_71 Retail circulation spaces. Sub-type differentiation (glazed or enclosed arcade with unit frontages on both sides) follows BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §3.4 (arcade width, natural daylighting, fire escape) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.1 (retail circulation, Em 300 lx; task variation for daylit atriums). CDM Regulations 2015 atrium maintenance access and glazing replacement procedures apply.

NBS Source SL_90_20_69 'Queuing areas' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces (buildig CSV v1.22 confirmed). Used here for retail queuing zones adjacent to checkout, customer service, and click-and-collect. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.3 (retail circulation/queuing, Em 300 lx) and BCSC Retail Design Guidelines 4th edition §7.1 (queue-management stanchion clearances) apply.

NBS Source SL_20_50_51 'Market stalls' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. ifc_space_type EXTERNAL reflects open-air market stall configuration; covered-market variants share the same canonical_id but are served by INTERNAL lighting circuits.

NBS Source SL_20_50_03 'Ambient wholesale spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Ambient denotes non-refrigerated bulk storage and selling floor (dry goods, hardware, general merchandise).

NBS Source SL_20_50_70 'Refrigerated wholesale spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Covers temperature-controlled food wholesale environments (0–8 °C ambient; specialist luminaires to IP65 minimum per BS EN 60529).

NBS Source SL_20_50_32 'Food and drink outlets' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Covers retail-context food/beverage units (café concessions, food court stalls, vending areas) distinct from standalone hospitality restaurants.

NBS Source SL_20_50_37 'Hair salons' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. NB: SL_20_50_36 'Hair and beauty salons' is also present and covers combined hair+beauty operations; this entry covers hair-only establishments.

NBS Source SL_20_50_36 'Hair and beauty salons' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. NB: SL_20_50_10 'Beauty salons' is also present and covers beauty-only establishments; SL_20_50_36 covers the combined format.

NBS Source SL_20_50_10 'Beauty salons' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Covers beauty-only studios (facials, manicure, lash treatments) excluding hair services.

NBS Source SL_20_50_86 'Tan spray booths' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Mechanical ventilation requirements per CIBSE Guide B2:2016 §6 (local exhaust ventilation for spray aerosol containment) apply.

NBS Source SL_20_50_87 'Tattoo and piercing parlours' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Local authority special treatment premises licensing under Local Government (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act 1982 applies.

NBS Source SL_20_50_05 'Auction rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Covers general goods auction rooms (antiques, fine art, general household — excluding livestock).

NBS Source SL_20_50_47 'Livestock auction rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_20_50 Commercial spaces. Confirmed in buildig CSV v1.22 and NBS primary mirror. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_20_50 as 'No current codes'; code retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Animal welfare standards under the Welfare of Animals (Transport) (England) Order 2006 and market-auction hygiene requirements apply.
